name: Pardee Resources Company
summary: Pardee Resources Company, Inc. owns, acquires, develops, and manages land and natural resource properties in the Appalachian region, including West Virginia, Kentucky, and Virginia. It owns and leases low-sulfur coal properties, such as steam and metallurgical reserves; manages oil and gas assets; and operates hardwood timber and surface lands. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania with regional offices in Scott Depot and Webster Springs, West Virginia; and Sugar Land, Texas.
